productName: J-HR-100PJ - Journeyman Hash Pineapple Jellies (100mg THC)
description: A gourmet crisp, sweet apple gummy imagined with island-grown cane sugar, orchard fruit, and the kind of small-batch technique usually reserved for handmade luxury candies. It features THC for a classic euphoric lift. Rich on flavor and easy to enjoy — start with a comfortable serving and let the edible do the rest.
